zh.Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: 英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓
zh.Warwick, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾沃里克
zh.Green's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: 英國諾薩普頓史爾格林也斯 諾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton於1421年2月10日出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton21歲，母親Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley28歲。他於1445年4月30日與Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1462年9月9日在他的家鄉享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton于1421年2月10日出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton21岁，母亲Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley28岁。他于1445年4月30日与Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1462年9月9日在他的家乡享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton was born on 10 February 1421, in Norton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton, was 21 and his mother, Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, was 28. He married Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton on 30 April 1445, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 September 1462, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton est né le 10 février 1421, à Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton le 30 avril 1445, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1462, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton am 10. Februar 1421 in Norton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton 21 und seine Mutter Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley 28. Er hat am 30. April 1445 in Warwick, Warwickshire, England Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. September 1462 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton è nato il il 10 febbraio 1421 nel Norton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton il 30 aprile 1445, nel Warwick, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 settembre 1462, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートン

ja.Green's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレエン'ス ノートン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Nortonが1421年2月10日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノートンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Nortonは21歳，母Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartleyは28歳であった。1445年4月30日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックでLady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1462年9月9日に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton(이)가 1421년 2월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1445년 4월 30일 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1462년 9월 9일 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.10 February 1421–9 September 1462: 10 de fevereiro de 1421–9 de setembro de 1462
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton nasceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1421, em Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton em 30 de abril de 1445, em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1462, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton родился 10 февраля 1421 г. в местности нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton 30 апреля 1445 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 сентября 1462 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год.

es.10 February 1421–9 September 1462: 10 de febrero de 1421–9 de septiembre de 1462
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton nació el 10 de febrero de 1421, en Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton el 30 de abril de 1445, en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1462, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años.
